detectors.description:
Reentrancy in INUSTRATOR.openTrading() (INUSTRATOR.sol#567-593):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (INUSTRATOR.sol#577)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (INUSTRATOR.sol#579)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (INUSTRATOR.sol#579)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (INUSTRATOR.sol#589)
	INUSTRATOR.tradingOpen (INUSTRATOR.sol#273) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- INUSTRATOR.openTrading() (INUSTRATOR.sol#567-593)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [INUSTRATOR.openTrading()](INUSTRATOR.sol#L567-L593):
	External calls:
	- [uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH())](INUSTRATOR.sol#L577)
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](INUSTRATOR.sol#L579)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](INUSTRATOR.sol#L579)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [tradingOpen = true](INUSTRATOR.sol#L589)
	[INUSTRATOR.tradingOpen](INUSTRATOR.sol#L273) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [INUSTRATOR.openTrading()](INUSTRATOR.sol#L567-L593)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in INUSTRATOR._transfer(address,address,uint256) (INUSTRATOR.sol#431-497):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (INUSTRATOR.sol#479)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (INUSTRATOR.sol#511-523)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (INUSTRATOR.sol#485)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (INUSTRATOR.sol#561)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (INUSTRATOR.sol#495)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (INUSTRATOR.sol#649)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (INUSTRATOR.sol#629)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (INUSTRATOR.sol#631)
	INUSTRATOR._rOwned (INUSTRATOR.sol#233) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- INUSTRATOR._takeTeam(uint256) (INUSTRATOR.sol#643-651)
	- INUSTRATOR._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (INUSTRATOR.sol#625-639)
	- INUSTRATOR.balanceOf(address) (INUSTRATOR.sol#349-353)
	- INUSTRATOR.constructor() (INUSTRATOR.sol#299-313)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (INUSTRATOR.sol#495)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (INUSTRATOR.sol#657)
	INUSTRATOR._rTotal (INUSTRATOR.sol#249) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- INUSTRATOR._getCurrentSupply() (INUSTRATOR.sol#749-759)
	- INUSTRATOR._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (INUSTRATOR.sol#655-661)
	- INUSTRATOR.constructor() (INUSTRATOR.sol#299-313)
	- INUSTRATOR.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (INUSTRATOR.sol#405-413)
